cards.title: Workflow State
cards.body: The local file-based workflow architecture is ready for validation.

cards.title: Runner Preview
cards.body: The runner preview can inspect one task and recommend the next action.

cards.title: Validator Chain
cards.body: The validator checks JSON, states, roles, blocked actions, and safety locks.

cards.title: Safety Locks
cards.body: Live trading, brokers, OANDA, API keys, secrets, real webhooks, real orders, installs, and background execution are blocked.
